g.text: ⇄ Convert — Swap codec, container, or both
✂ Cut — Trim, slice, or extract a clip
⤢ Scale — Resize to fit, fill, or an exact size
▣ Crop — Reframe to a ratio or exact rectangle
⟳ Orientate — Rotate or flip the frame
◐ Colour — Grade, tint, or apply a LUT
𝐓 Text — Burn in captions, titles, or a watermark [unavailable: this ffmpeg lacks drawtext — brew
⧉ Composite — Overlay, picture-in-picture, stack, or chroma key with a second file
◷ Time — Frame rate, speed, loops, and freezes
♪ Sound — Extract, mute, remix, or normalize audio
▤ Metadata — Add, change, or strip file tags
✚ Repair — Fix timestamps, conform frame rate, faststart, tolerant remux
